title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXVIII. Paradoxes.
content:
Tobacco wick! tobacco wick!
        When you're well, 'twill make you sick:
        Tobacco wick! tobacco wick!
        'Twill make you well when you are sick.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXVIII. Paradoxes.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
